leadText: Accumula Town (Japanese: カラクサタウン Karakusa Town) is a small town located in southeastern Unova. The town has two exits: to the south is Route 1, leading to Nuvema Town; to the west is Route 2, leading northwards to Striaton City. In Pokémon Black and White, the town is where the player first encounters Team Plasma, Ghetsis, and N. When the player first enters the town, Professor Juniper stands outside the Pokémon Center, and Team Plasma Grunts prevent the player from continuing to Route 2. After the player speaks to Professor Juniper, entering the Pokémon Center to experience the tutorial, Ghetsis and Team Plasma will appear in the town square. Either approaching them or attempting to bypass them will automatically begin their speech.

sections.title: Slogan
sections.text: Slogan [ edit | edit source ] The Fast-Growing Town! (Japanese: 生い茂る ツルは 繁栄の証 Thick ivy is proof of prosperity. )

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Town square [ edit | edit source ] In the center of the town is an open, park-like area. It is here that Team Plasma makes their first speech in Black and White , and Ghetsis encourages the citizens of Accumula to release their Pokémon. After Ghetsis leaves, N appears out of the crowd and tries to listen and talk to the player 's Pokémon. After he communicates with the player's Pokémon, he challenges the player to a battle. Pokémon rock-paper-scissors [ edit | edit source ] In a house in the north-west of town, there is a little girl who will challenge the player to a game of Pokémon rock-paper-scissors. Instead of using rock, paper, and scissors, this game uses Fire , Grass , and Water .
